latin: Vir, qui totam vitam in scaena ignorans vixerat, ad portam caeli falsam pervenit. ad spectatores invisos conversus dixit: 'et si vos non iterum videro — bonum mane, bonum meridiem, et bonam noctem!'

questions.prompt: What does the man discover about his life?
questions.target: He has been living on a stage without knowing it
choices: He has been living on a stage without knowing it

questions.prompt: What does he say before leaving?
questions.target: A cheerful greeting and goodbye for all times of day
choices: A cheerful greeting and goodbye for all times of day

translation: A man, who had unknowingly lived his entire life on a stage, reached a false door in the sky. Turning to the unseen viewers he said: 'And if I don't see you again — good morning, good afternoon, and good night!'
